long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between cbs02.eq01.mad01 et-4/0/18 <-> cbs02.dr01.mad03 et-6/0/18. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19817
